text: Hezbollah official says the group won't abide by any agreements from Lebanon-Israel talks in the US - AP News
fullText: A senior Hezbollah official says the Lebanese militant group will not abide by any agreements made in upcoming direct talks between Israel and Lebanon in the United States. The talks, which are to start on Tuesday, will be the first in decades. Hezbollah oppo…

text: 'RHOA's Drew Sidora's Monthly Income Revealed in Divorce Battle - TMZ
fullText: "The Real Housewives of Atlanta" star Drew Sidora's 5-figure monthly income was exposed as part of her ugly divorce battle ... this, according to docs from her messy divorce.

text: U.K. inquiry lays bare 'catastrophic' missed chances before stabbings at dance class - NPR
fullText: An inquiry found that a mass killing by a British teenager in 2024 at a Taylor Swift-themed dance class could have been prevented if his parents and state agencies had acted on his violence fixation.

text: China Evergrande Founder Pleads Guilty to Fraud in Downfall - Bloomberg
fullText: China Evergrande Group’s founder has pleaded guilty to a number of charges including fundraising fraud and bribery in a Chinese court, cementing the downfall of a property tycoon who was emblematic of the country’s real estate boom and bust.

text: Rep. Tony Gonzales to resign from Congress amid backlash over sexual misconduct allegations - The Texas Tribune
fullText: House members were set to vote this week on expelling both the San Antonio Republican and Democratic Rep. Eric Swalwell. Gonzales’ announcement came shortly after Swalwell said he would step down.

text: Stone Age tombs in Scotland reveal 'webs of descent' among male relatives - Live Science
fullText: An analysis of DNA from Stone Age skeletons buried in Scotland reveals how people organized the burial of their dead.

text: A dozen battleground Dems send Swalwell’s campaign donations to charity - Politico

text: Justin Bieber’s YouTube Coachella set had nothing to do with who owns his music - The Verge
fullText: During his set at Coachella, Justin Bieber played clips of older songs off YouTube, and while the Daily Mail speculates that he couldn’t play full versions because he sold his catalog, experts say that’s not true.
